62 Brhat Samhitd
An eclipse occurring in the month of Phalguna will prove
harmful to the people of Bengal, Asmaka, AvantJ, and those that
live on the Mckala mountain, dancers, crops, noble women, bow-
makers (i.e. manufacturers of weapons), Ksatriyas and hermits.

An eclipse falling in the month of Gaitra would affect pain-
ters, writers, musicians, dancing girls, Vcdic scholars, dealers in
gold, people of Pundra, Orissa, Kckaya and Asmaka, There would
also be erratic rainfall in the year.
